name: micky-psych-tools
description: Personal Claude Code plugins for clinical psychiatry, evidence appraisal, and pre-build alignment.

plugins.name: pubmed-research-note
plugins.description: Answers a clinical decision from primary literature. Verdict-first, quantified, trial-registry-checked evidence reports; renders the report inline and files it to the vault by default, atomic notes on request. Chains to the intent-lock plugin when the request carries no decision.

plugins.name: intent-lock
plugins.description: Interrogate a request until it has exactly one reading, then build it. Uncapped rounds, a compounding misread ledger, silent convergence gates.

plugins.name: plugin-creator
plugins.description: Plugin lifecycle toolkit for this marketplace. /new-plugin scaffolds a new plugin (elicit checklist, generate component skeleton, register, validate); /refine-plugin audits and refines an existing plugin or skill, then bumps and validates. /route regenerates ROUTING.md and routes a request to the owning skill or command.

plugins.name: vault-keeper
plugins.description: Files, indexes, links, and retrieves any skill's output in the shared Obsidian-style vault at the marketplace repo root (vault/). The single place everything lands. Four jobs: init, save, index, query.

plugins.name: psych-paper-digest
plugins.description: Multi-domain literature surveillance on a personal watchlist. Sweeps PubMed and ClinicalTrials.gov for what appeared since the last sweep and delivers a triaged, read-once digest — practice-changing first, worth-reading next, noise suppressed with counts. Hands practice-changing items to pubmed-research-note and vault saves to vault-keeper.
